purpose: Dynamic relationship memory for two characters. Stores both sides in one file.
load_rules: Load if both characters are active/nearby/speaking/observing each other in the current scene.
Load if one character directly thinks/speaks about the other and the relationship is relevant to current scene goal.
Load if current calendar day or open thread explicitly requires this pair.
Do not load only because Akira is POV.
Do not load all Akira relationship pairs by default.

protected_moments.why_it_matters: why this person would remember it
protected_moments.future_hook: how it can affect later reactions

compaction_rules: Do not flatten a complex relationship into a single generic label.
Keep separate what each side knows, suspects, hides and misunderstands.
If a moment changed future behavior, keep it as a hook.
